category_sources: source_facts.description says PDF to JSON and XML converter; official GitHub README describes PDF2JSON as a converter to JSON and XML.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is PDF2JSON; source_facts.name is pdf2json.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README includes usage, build, install, and license sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/flexpaper/pdf2json; per instruction repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists pdf2json; source_facts.description and official README identify JSON/XML conversion from PDFs.
